originalAlarm.description: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 65) and is dereferenced.

model:
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_RECURSIVE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 66: `curr->val` dereferenced after malloc at L65 without a NULL check — potential null dereference. This is in main() outside any #ifdef block, so the bug occurs in all configurations. No '// ERROR' at L66 → new bug not in VBDB. PC requires RECURSIVE=F AND SORTFILES=T, but neither flag affects the malloc/deref in main(). PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
